name: Eyeogotchi Dev Container
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y build-essential && pip install -r requirements.txt

bash -c 'apt-get update && apt-get install -y build-essential && pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt && for req in extensions/*/requirements.txt; do if [ -f "$req" ]; then echo Installing $req; pip install --no-cache-dir -r "$req"; fi; done'
